raw.message:
What’s That Sound? 👂🏻
It’s All the Jackpots You Could Be Winning in Quick Hit Casino! 🎉🎈

hook.summary: Energetic cats jumping over golden eggs to introduce the Astro Cat slot.
hook.visual_action: Two animated white cats jump over a field of golden eggs against a scenic Asian-inspired background.

scene_flow: Animated cats jump over golden eggs in a field to introduce the game.
Slot reels spin and trigger a bonus round with golden eggs filling the screen.
A fox character appears and vacuums up gold coins from the board.
Colorful smoke bursts transition the scene to the final branding screen.
End card displays the game title, 'New Slot Alert', and a call to action.
audience_proxy: Casual social casino players who enjoy vibrant, animal-themed slot machines.
